+[  Authentication  ]--+
|                      |
|      +---------+     |
|      |  Login  |     |
|      +----+----+     |
|           |          |
|           v          |
|    +------------+    |
|    |  Validate  |    |
|    +------+-----+    |
|           |          |
|           |          |
|           |          |
+-----------o----------+
            |
            |
          --+
+[  Processing  ]---+
|         |         |
|         v         |
|    +---------+    |
|    |  Parse  |    |
|    +----+----+    |
|         |         |
|         v         |
|   +-----------+   |
|   |  Execute  |   |
|   +-----------+   |
|                   |
|                   |
+-------------------+
